summary: Fixed CRITICAL BUG: Frontend-Backend URL mismatch for Approve/Reject endpoints in Unified Payment Dashboard. Bank Redeem and RD/Savings Vault approve/reject functionality was broken due to incorrect API URL paths in frontend code.

critical.issue: FIXED: Was using wrong collection (bank_redeem_requests) instead of correct collection (bank_withdrawal_requests) for bank type requests

integration_issues.issue: FIXED: Frontend was calling /admin/bank-redeem/requests/{id}/approve but backend route is /admin/bank-redeem/{id}/approve (extra /requests/ in path)
FIXED: Frontend was calling /rd/admin/redeem/{id}/approve but backend route is /rd/admin/redeem-requests/{id}/approve (missing -requests in path)

critical_code_review_comments: Frontend AdminUnifiedPayments.js - Fixed all 8 API endpoint URLs for approve/reject operations
Backend server.py - Fixed revert-status endpoint to use correct collection (bank_withdrawal_requests)
Verified revert functionality works correctly after fix
All API endpoints tested and working: approve, reject, revert-to-pending
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing pending request BWR2026021416265583906E
context_for_next_testing_agent: Approve/Reject functionality for Unified Payment Dashboard has been fixed. Bank redeem, RD/Savings Vault, and revert-to-pending all working. EMI approve/reject not tested due to no pending EMI requests. Frontend URL fixes applied to handleApprove, handleReject, handleBulkApprove, handleBulkReject functions.

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: URL path mismatch between frontend API calls and backend route definitions
reproduction_steps: 2. Click on a pending bank redeem request to expand
fix_applied: Same changes applied to reject endpoints and bulk operations
Backend: Fixed revert-status endpoint collection from bank_redeem_requests to bank_withdrawal_requests
rca_of_the_issue.verification: Tested approve endpoint with curl - returns 200 success. Full pytest suite passes.
